privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the final text file to be at /home/ga/Desktop/galileo_exhibit.txt and expects screenshots to be stored in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium. The Padua coordinates of 45.4064 N and 11.8768 E correspond to 0.79249 and 0.20729 radians respectively, matching the verifier logic. The target data is synthetically generated via the setup_task.sh script rather than sourced directly from historical observation logs.
